---
title: Wrap-It-Up Workflow Contracts
scope: src/tools/wrap_it_up.py
---

# Wrap-It-Up Workflow — Behavioral Contracts

## SovereignWrapper Lifecycle

### Initial Structural Scan
```
Feature: Initial System Awareness
  Scenario: Wrap-up begins with a full system scan
    Given the wrap_it_up workflow is commanded
    When SovereignWrapper.initial_scan() executes
    Then cstar pennyone --scan is triggered
    And the current state of the system is cached in .stats/
```

### Release the Ravens
```
Feature: Autonomous Improvement Phase
  Scenario: Ravens are set free to stabilize the system
    Given the initial scan is complete
    When SovereignWrapper.release_ravens() executes
    Then cstar ravens start is triggered
    And Muninn begins its autonomous flight across the matrix
```

### Wait for Completion
```
Feature: Flight Synchronization
  Scenario: System waits for Ravens to finish their mission
    Given the Ravens have been released
    When SovereignWrapper.wait_for_ravens() executes
    Then it monitors .agent/muninn.pid
    And it blocks until the PID file is cleared or timeout is reached
    And it prints "Muninn is done flying" upon landing
```

### Test Suite & Auto-Fix
```
Feature: Gungnir Gate & Stability Verification
  Scenario: Test suite identifies and fixes regressions
    Given the Ravens have finished their flight
    When SovereignWrapper.run_gungnir_gate() executes
    Then it runs Ruff and NPM test suites
    And if tests fail, it triggers a recursive Raven fix cycle (up to 3 attempts)
    And it returns success only if the final state is green
```

### Final Ingestion & Scan
```
Feature: Final System Synchronization
  Scenario: Recent work is ingested and documented
    Given the test suite is green
    When SovereignWrapper.synchronize_state() executes
    Then it runs a final PennyOne scan
    And it compiles neural traces into TRACE_REPORT.qmd
    And it updates the Gemini Neural Manifest
    And it syncs walkthrough.qmd with new capabilities
```

### Learning Pulse (Atomic GPT)
```
Feature: Neural Learning Pulse
  Scenario: Session results are fed back into the Warden
    Given the synchronization is complete
    When SovereignWrapper.review_technical_debt() executes
    Then it processes the anomalies queue
    And it triggers a SessionWarden learning pulse with session metrics
    And the Atomic GPT model is updated with session intelligence
```

### Sovereign Commit
```
Feature: Final System Commit
  Scenario: Session work is committed with a decree
    Given all previous steps are successful
    When SovereignWrapper.sovereign_commit() executes
    Then it stages all changes in git
    And it generates a commit message with the "Dominion Expanded" decree
    And it pushes the changes to the remote repository
```

### Global Dormancy
```
Feature: Resource Reclamation
  Scenario: System enters a secure dormancy state
    Given the commit is complete
    When SovereignWrapper.teardown() executes
    Then it triggers cstar sleep
    And all daemons (Oracle, PennyOne) are silenced
    And memory is reclaimed via garbage collection
```
